'''Jojighar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] famed for his service to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], alive sometime between the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] and the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. He was commemorated by the [[Biscuit Baron]] food chain by way of a [[Holocube/Legends|holocube]] dispensed with certain food orders.

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Jojighar was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. During his lifetime, Master Jojighar served with distinction, remembered after his death by the [[Biscuit Baron]] food chain, attempting to promote the [[Loyalist/Legends|Loyalist]] cause by offering commemorative [[Holocube/Legends|holocubes]] of "Heroes of the Republic" with their [[QuickSnack]] and [[QuickSnackLite]] meals. Along with Master Jojighar, fellow Jedi [[Ikrit]], [[S'diawae]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], and [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellors]] [[Anwis Eddicus]] and [[Vaila Pecivas]] were some of the other optional collectibles.<ref name="HNN" />
